home.headline: Full-stack engineer building web apps and applied AI.
home.subline: I'm Carlos, a full-stack & AI engineer in Alicante, Spain. I ship production web products — SaaS, platforms, and community tools — and build day to day with modern stacks plus AI-assisted development, from Symfony and Next.js to local LLMs and RAG.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description:
Carlos is a full-stack engineer with 2 years of professional experience building web applications with Symfony, Angular, Vue, and DevOps workflows. His focus is increasingly on applied AI: deploying local LLMs (Ollama, llama.cpp), prompt evaluation, RAG pipelines, and edge AI on devices like NVIDIA Jetson.

Contact: caromamusic@gmail.com · +34 637 088 497

achievements: Designed, built and maintained full-stack web applications end to end — REST APIs and business logic in Symfony (PHP), and reactive frontends in Angular and Vue.
Built and operated email delivery infrastructure with Postfix, handling high-volume sending and deliverability.
Developed email systems and marketing automation workflows running at scale.
Set up and maintained CI/CD pipelines and containerized services with Docker and GitHub Actions, deploying to Linux servers behind Nginx.
Worked with relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL) for application data and reporting.
Developed and shipped web application improvements in C# / .NET, implementing backend features and fixing production issues.
Administered and optimized MySQL and PostgreSQL databases, tuning queries and schema for performance.
Managed and maintained the Linux servers hosting the applications.

warera.title: Warera — A complete web OS for gaming communities
warera.summary: A complete web operating system for online gaming communities: file indexing and an API layer interconnecting multiple games and Discord, all in one place.
warera.body:
## Overview

Warera is a complete web operating system for online gaming communities. It provides a desktop-like web environment with file indexing and an API layer that interconnects multiple games and Discord, so a community can manage data, coordinate strategy and run tools from a single place. Authentication is handled through Discord, so members log in with the account they already use.

## Key Features

- Web OS environment with a desktop-like, windowed UI
- File indexing and management
- API interconnection across multiple games and Discord
- Real-time strategic dashboards for community coordination
- Discord-based single sign-on

## Target Audience

Competitive online gaming communities — clans and alliances that coordinate through Discord and need centralized tooling. The first deployment serves the WarEra España community.

## Business Opportunity

A subscription model per community, plus a white-label / multi-game model where the same web OS can be deployed for other games' communities. Discord-native distribution keeps user acquisition cost low.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router)
- **API:** tRPC (end-to-end type safety)
- **Auth:** NextAuth with Discord provider
- **Database:** MySQL with Prisma ORM
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS

lesly.title: Lesly — Full-stack web app with auth & admin dashboard
lesly.summary: Multiplatform live concert streaming app with full authentication, social login, and an admin dashboard. v1 web (Laravel) and v2 mobile (Flutter), both with a Laravel backend.
lesly.body:
## Overview

Multiplatform application for live concert streaming. The first version shipped as a responsive web app with a Laravel frontend; the second version moved the client to Flutter while keeping Laravel as the backend in both iterations. Includes a complete authentication system (sign-up, login, password reset, Facebook OAuth) and an admin dashboard.

## Key Features

- **Auth + social login**: Sign-up, login, password reset, and Facebook OAuth.
- **Admin dashboard**: Content and user management for operators.
- **Responsive UI**: Web-first experience in v1; native mobile in v2.
- **Live streaming**: Concert broadcast workflows across both versions.

## Target Audience

Live-music fans, and artists or venues that want to stream and watch live concerts across web and mobile.

## Business Opportunity

Pay-per-view ticketing for live events, subscriptions, and revenue share with artists and venues.

## Tech Stack

- **Web:** Laravel (PHP)
- **Mobile app:** Flutter
- **Database:** MySQL

olvida.title: Olvida — Reduce your digital footprint
olvida.summary: Platform that helps users shrink their online footprint through automated, legally-compliant data-removal processes, always under the user's express authorization.
olvida.body:
## Overview

Olvida is a platform that helps people reduce their digital footprint on the internet. It automates data-removal and opt-out processes against third parties through legally-compliant workflows, always executed under the user's express authorization. The goal is to give individuals back control over their personal data with minimal effort on their side.

## Key Features

- Automated data-removal / opt-out workflows
- Legally-compliant processes with explicit user consent
- Clean, accessible UI built on a modern component system

## Target Audience

Privacy-conscious individuals in the EU who want to remove or limit their personal data online without doing it manually.

## Business Opportunity

A recurring subscription privacy service (in the space of Incogni or DeleteMe), with B2C recurring revenue and potential B2B use cases such as employee data offboarding.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Components:** shadcn/ui

ebisu.title: eBISU — Sales & payments management platform
ebisu.summary: SaaS platform to manage a business's sales and payments with transaction history, analytics, ticketing, and a public API. University of Alicante project.
ebisu.body:
## Overview

SaaS platform to manage a business's sales and payments: full transaction history, advanced analytics dashboard, ticketing support, and a public API for integrations. Developed as a University of Alicante project.

## Key Features

- **Transaction history**: Complete record of sales and payment events.
- **Analytics dashboard**: Business metrics and visual insights.
- **Secure payments**: Payment processing with audit trail.
- **Public REST API**: Endpoints for third-party integrations.

## Target Audience

Small and medium businesses and merchants that need to track sales, payments and transactions with analytics in one dashboard.

## Business Opportunity

SaaS subscription tiers, with potential transaction/processing fees and paid API access for third-party integrations.

## Tech Stack

- **Backend:** Laravel (PHP)
- **Frontend:** Blade templates + jQuery
- **Database:** MySQL
- **API:** REST (public API for integrations)

tusofertasdehoy.title: TusOfertasDeHoy — Daily deals aggregator
tusofertasdehoy.summary: Web platform that aggregates and displays daily product deals and offers with affiliate links.
tusofertasdehoy.body:
## Overview

Web platform that aggregates and displays daily product deals and offers with affiliate links. Users can browse curated deals, compare prices, and follow outbound links to partner stores.

## Key Features

- **Deals listing**: Daily refreshed catalog of product offers.
- **Product cards with prices**: Structured cards with pricing and deal metadata.
- **Affiliate integration**: Outbound tracking links to partner retailers.

## Target Audience

Bargain hunters and deal seekers in Spain looking for daily curated product offers.

## Business Opportunity

Affiliate commissions (Amazon and others) plus display advertising. The n8n automation keeps content fresh at near-zero marginal cost, which makes the model scalable.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** Next.js
- **Backend:** Node.js 18+
- **Database:** MySQL
- **Automation:** n8n (automated deal aggregation & updates)
